settings.subtitle: SmartComfort Technology
settings.title: Experience the Future of Sleep
settings.description: Patented adaptive grid technology that adjusts to your body, delivering perfect support and breathability all night long.

settings.subtitle: Our Technology
settings.title: Engineered for Perfect Sleep
settings.text: Our innovative sleep technology uses a patented adaptive grid structure that intelligently responds to your body's pressure points. Unlike traditional foam, our SmartComfort grid flexes where you need softness and supports where you need firmness — delivering a personalized sleep experience every single night.

settings.subtitle: Compare
settings.title: Compare Our Mattresses
settings.description: Not sure which mattress is right for you? Compare our top models side by side.

settings.subtitle: FAQ
settings.title: Got Questions? We've Got Answers
settings.cta_text: Still have questions? We're here to help.

settings.question: How does the 100-night trial work?
settings.answer: Try your new mattress for 100 nights in the comfort of your own home. If you're not completely satisfied, we'll arrange a free pickup and give you a full refund. No questions asked.

settings.question: What firmness level should I choose?
settings.answer: It depends on your sleep position. Side sleepers generally prefer medium-soft, back sleepers do well with medium-firm, and stomach sleepers typically prefer firm. Our sleep quiz can help you find the perfect match.

settings.question: How is the mattress delivered?
settings.answer: Your mattress is compressed, rolled, and shipped in a box directly to your door. Free shipping typically takes 3-7 business days. Simply unbox, unroll, and let it expand for 24-48 hours.

settings.question: Do you offer financing?
settings.answer: Yes! We partner with Affirm to offer 0% APR financing for qualifying customers. You can split your purchase into easy monthly payments at checkout.

settings.question: What does the warranty cover?
settings.answer: Our 10-year warranty covers manufacturing defects including sagging greater than 1 inch, broken or cracked foam, and physical flaws in the mattress that cause it to split or crack despite normal usage.
